name: ExtensionMedicationRequest_EffectiveDosePeriod
title: R5: Period over which the medication is to be taken (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicationRequest.effectiveDosePeriod` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicationRequest.effectiveDosePeriod` 0..1 `Period`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicationRequest.effectiveDosePeriod` 0..1 `Period`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicationRequest.effectiveDosePeriod` has a context of MedicationRequest based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicationRequest`.
Element `MedicationRequest.effectiveDosePeriod` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Period over which the medication is to be taken (new)
element.comment:
Element `MedicationRequest.effectiveDosePeriod` has a context of MedicationRequest based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicationRequest`.
Element `MedicationRequest.effectiveDosePeriod` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Period over which the medication is to be taken
element.definition: The period over which the medication is to be taken.  Where there are multiple dosageInstruction lines (for example, tapering doses), this is the earliest date and the latest end date of the dosageInstructions.
